headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -136.8)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 26% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 169 quotes and an exceptionally high strong-intensity count (142 out of 169) driving the score to 124.4 — people are venting forcefully today.
• The frustration score is near the top of its 188-day range (peak: 171.9), making this one of the most heated days on record.
• Fears and Optimism are both in negative territory, suggesting subdued but not unusually quiet activity outside the frustration spike.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
